forgot_password.title: Forgot Password?
forgot_password.subtitle: Don't worry! Enter your email address and we'll send you a code to reset your password.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.subtitle: Create a new strong password for your account

verify_email.title: Verify Your Email
verify_email.subtitle: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to

screen1.title: Your health, all in one place
screen1.description: Store your medical records, medicine reminders, and family profiles easily in Cureta.

screen2.title: Keep your medical history safe
screen2.description: Save your diseases, notes, prescriptions, tests, and scans in one place.

screen3.title: Never Miss Your Medicine
screen3.description: Get simple reminder at the right time

screen4.title: Instant Medication Setup
screen4.description: Scan your prescription to automatically set up medicine alerts and track your treatment.

screen5.title: Share your health info safely
screen5.description: Create a QR code and choose what medical data to share.

screen6.title: Care for your family
screen6.description: Add profiles for your family members and switch between them easily.

screen7.title: Your personal health assistant
screen7.description: Ask questions and get instant, reliable health advice personalized just for you.

add_record.condition_question: What is the disease or condition?
add_record.condition_example: e.g. Diabetes, Allergy, High blood pressure
add_record.first_symptoms_question: When did you first notice symptoms?
add_record.related_files_description: Select a category below to upload a photo or PDF. This helps doctors understand your history better.

validation.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
